title: FAIR Data JSON Schema Dialect Declaration Meta-Schema
description: Demonstrates Mechanism 3: a custom schema dialect. Schemas that set '$schema' to the FAIR dialect URI opt into all FAIR vocabularies at once. This vocabulary illustrates how the dialect acts as a named bundle of vocabularies.
$comment: Users of the FAIR dialect write '$schema': 'https://highvaluedata.net/fair-data-schema' in their data schemas. The composite meta-schema at that URI applies allOf the vocabulary meta-schemas, so a single $schema declaration brings the whole extension set.
